at_a_glance: Promptly has cost an estimated $11.87 across ~20 sessions over two days. The project is 98% complete — only broader distribution work (notarisation, landing page) remains. The most expensive phase was Phase 4 React migration at ~$5.58 total, driven by the 14-task FEATURE-004 renderer rewrite and the History panel. Note: 7 sessions of Phase 4 work were not recorded in history.json — the gap (~$4.65) is estimated here. All other costs are healthy: no single session exceeded $1.30.

session_narratives.2026-04-18-001: Planning day — brainstorm, architect, and spec review. Three heavy reading tasks establishing BRIEF.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, and full SPEC. Expected spend for a planning session.
session_narratives.2026-04-18-002: Most expensive tracked session — all 9 Phase 1 tasks plus phase-1-review in one run. 11 tasks at $0.12 average is efficient; cost driven by volume and a 55K-token review.
session_narratives.2026-04-18-003: Spec and planning session for F-STATE. No code committed — pure spec writing and review. Lighter than the build sessions that followed.
session_narratives.2026-04-18-004: F-STATE build — 5 tasks completing the full state machine, CSS, and IPC wiring. Efficient at $0.10/task average.
session_narratives.2026-04-18-005: F-FIRST-RUN planning and spec. Large spec write (88K input) for the first-run feature. No build tasks yet.
session_narratives.2026-04-18-006: Lightest tracked session — finished one F-FIRST-RUN task and ran vibe-cost. $0.20 for a half-session of cleanup.
session_narratives.2026-04-18-007: Dark glass design implementation plus 6 BUG-002 visual fixes. The large design output (10K tokens) drove the output cost up.
session_narratives.2026-04-18-008: DECISION-004 (recording refactor from pillWin to main window) plus BUG-004 vibrancy fixes. Architecture-level refactor required deep reading.
session_narratives.2026-04-18-009: Heaviest Phase 2 session — vibrancy fixes across two rounds, BUG-007 RAF loop, and the full FEATURE-001 splash screen. $0.68 for 6 tasks is reasonable given the scope.
session_narratives.2026-04-18-010: Phase 2 review (L task, 80K input tokens) plus all BL-013–023 fixes. The phase-2-review alone was $0.31 — expected for a full codebase audit.
session_narratives.2026-04-18-011: Final review reading 9 source files, writing the gate report, RFX-001 console cleanup, and vibe-cost. Light session at $0.38 — v1 shipped.
session_narratives.2026-04-19-012: Phase 4 session: parallel build (dark mode, tray), then removed F-HISTORY and F-LANGUAGE from vanilla JS before React migration. Session elevated by continuation overhead.
session_narratives.untracked-013-015: FEATURE-004 React migration across ~3 sessions — branch setup, Vite config, 11 React components, hooks, main.js electron loading, and smoke test (14 tasks total, ~$2.20 est.). Most expensive feature of the project.
session_narratives.untracked-016: FEATURE-006 Shortcuts panel (5 tasks) — ShortcutsPanel.jsx, App.jsx SHORTCUTS state, keyboard listener, global shortcut in main.js. ~$0.60 est.
session_narratives.untracked-017: FEATURE-007 export + FEATURE-008 simplification (6 tasks) — ExportPanel.jsx, save-file IPC, then simplified to direct .md export. ~$0.55 est.
session_narratives.untracked-018: FEATURE-009 History panel (5 tasks) — history.js utility, split-panel HistoryPanel.jsx, App.jsx wiring, IPC channels. ~$0.65 est.
session_narratives.untracked-019: BUG-011 full rewrite + BUG-SC-001 + review:FEATURE-009 + RFX-F009 fixes + vibe-graph × 2. ~$1.25 est. across ~2 sessions.
session_narratives.2026-04-19-013: Session startup only — read 4 context files, ran vibe-cost. No tasks completed. $0.17.

recommendations.title: Prompt caching never activated — 0% cache hit rate
recommendations.body: Every session loaded CLAUDE.md and CODEBASE.md from scratch. CLAUDE.md is 15KB and changes every session (Active Feature sections appended inline), which disables caching eligibility. On a next project, keep CLAUDE.md structurally stable — move the Active Feature block to a separate file. Cache reads cost 90% less than fresh reads.

recommendations.title: DECISIONS.md at 54KB — context pressure growing
recommendations.body: DECISIONS.md has grown to 54KB (~13,500 tokens). Any skill that reads it in full (vibe-review, vibe-graph, vibe-changelog) pays ~$0.04 per read just for this file. Archive decisions older than Phase 2 to DECISIONS_ARCHIVE.md before the next major feature cycle.

forecast_narrative: Only 2 tasks remain: broader distribution (notarisation, Sparkle auto-update, public landing page). Expect $0.30–0.60 for the remaining work — lightweight research and config tasks. Total project cost at completion: ~$12.20–12.50. If DECISIONS.md is trimmed before the next feature cycle, expect ~$0.15 savings per review session going forward.
